text: You are worthy of love and belonging, exactly as you are.
Your identity is valid. Your feelings are valid. You are valid.
You are part of a beautiful, diverse community that celebrates you.
Every step you take on your journey is an act of courage.
Joy is your birthright. Embrace it fully and unapologetically.
The love you give and receive makes the world brighter.
You deserve to take up space and be seen.
Your story matters, and sharing it can change the world.
It is okay to set boundaries. It is okay to say no.
You are allowed to be both a masterpiece and a work in progress.
